name: mouse-jiggle
title: Mouse Jiggle
description: Continuously jiggle the mouse cursor with dramatic zigzag movements to prevent sleep
author: stevefrost

commands.name: start-jiggle
commands.title: Start Mouse Jiggle
commands.description: Start continuously jiggling the mouse cursor

commands.name: stop-jiggle
commands.title: Stop Mouse Jiggle
commands.description: Stop the mouse jiggle background process

preferences.name: funMode
preferences.title: Fun Mode
preferences.label: Draw visible mouse trail
preferences.description: When enabled, an orange overlay shows the mouse's path as a continuous visible line across the screen
